response.step_by_step_log: 1. The video begins at 00:00 with Tokino Sora and Kazama Iroha talking, establishing a conversational scene. No vocal music is present. 2. At 04:03, the conversation ends and a musical performance begins. On-screen text identifies the song as 'ヒビカセ' (Hibikase), with credits for lyrics (Reol) and composition (Giga). 3. Searched for 'ヒビカセ Reol Giga lyrics' to obtain the complete lyrics in Japanese and a reliable English translation. 4. Constructed the JSON object, mapping scenes, performer information, and full, un-truncated lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introductory conversation between Tokino Sora and Kazama Iroha, followed by their vocal performance of the song 'Hibikase'.

scenes.description: The video begins with Tokino Sora and Kazama Iroha in 3D avatars engaging in a casual conversation before their performance. No vocal music is playing during this segment.
Tokino Sora and Kazama Iroha perform 'Hibikase'. Text on screen identifies the song title as 'ヒビカセ' and credits Reol for lyrics and Giga for composition.
